versions.version_description: Key of Ebm instead of D#. Its also transcribed a bit more simple that the other version. The second verse can just be played Ebm, the chord variations are not needed and really just show the movement of the one note holding the same chord. They do the same in the second part of the first verse.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Its So Hard To Say Goodbye To Yesterday

recommended.version_description: Newly revised. Includes strumming patterns and improved chord placement.

content:
Thank You
by Boyz II Men
from the album `II`

Standard tuning
Capo 1

Sequence (as included here):
- Verse 1
- Chorus
- Verse 2
- Chorus x 2
- Bridge/Interlude
- Chorus x 4

Intro:
NC (beatboxing)
a'Like this, a like this 


Verse 1:
NC    Dm
I was young (BOP)
[tab]    [ch]Dm/C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch] 
And didn't have nowhere to run[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm/C[/ch]        [ch]Dm[/ch]          
I needed to wake up and see[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm/C[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]
What was in front of me[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm/C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Nah, Nah, Oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G7[/ch] 
There had to be a better way[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A7[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C#M[/ch]
To show I'm grateful, hmmmmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Dm/C[/ch]         [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Dm/C[/ch]
So I thought up this song[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Dm/C[/ch]             [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]Dm/C[/ch]
To show my appreciation for lovin' me so long[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
You don't know much you mean to me[/tab]


Chorus:
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Dm/C#[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Cause even though when times got rough[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G/B[/ch]
You never turned away[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm6[/ch]
You were right there[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]A/C#[/ch]
And I thank you, thank you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]     [ch]Dm/C#[/ch]       [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
When I felt I had enough[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G/B[/ch]
You never turned away[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm6[/ch]
You were right there[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]A/C#[/ch]
And I thank you, thank you[/tab]


Verse 2:
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
All through my life[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm/C[/ch]      [ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]Dm/C[/ch]
I knew that you'd be my world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]Dm/C[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]
Knowing everywhere I go[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dm/C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
Things you taught me they would show[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
So many times and changes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/C[/ch]
You've seen me through[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]                                   [ch]Dm/C[/ch]
I sure enough couldn't have survived without you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Dm/C[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Dm/C[/ch]
And so I thought up this song[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]Dm/C[/ch]           [ch]Dm[/ch]      [ch]Dm/C[/ch]
To show my appreciation for lovin' me so long[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]A7[/ch]
You don't know how much you mean to me[/tab]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]         [ch]Dm/C#[/ch]                 [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
